info.title: ListingManager
info.description: The EssentialCSharp.ListingManager helps to organize and manage the EssentialCSharp source code

arguments.name: DIRECTORYIN
arguments.description: The directory of the chapter to update listings on.

options.name: --all-chapters
options.description: The passed in path is the parent directory to many chapter directories rather than a single chapter directory.

options.name: --single-dir
options.description: All listings are in a single directory and not separated into chapter and chapter test directories.

arguments.name: DIRECTORYIN
arguments.description: The directory of the chapter to update listings on.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Updates namespaces and filenames for all listings and accompanying tests within a chapter

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Displays more detailed messages in the log.

options.name: --preview
options.description: Displays the changes that will be made without actually making them.

options.name: --by-folder
options.description: Updates namespaces and filenames for all listings and accompanying tests within a folder.

options.name: --single-dir
options.description: All listings are in a single directory and not separated into chapter and chapter test directories.

options.name: --all-chapters
options.description: The passed in path is the parent directory to many chapter directories rather than a single chapter directory.

arguments.name: DIRECTORYIN
arguments.description: The directory of the chapter to update listings on.
